title: Arista Networks: Paving The AI Highway, But Unattractive Returns
text: Arista Networks, Inc. specializes in software-driven cloud networking solutions for data centers and cloud computing environments. The rise of AI and Cloud Computing will bring great demand for data centers, and Arista is one of the largest players in this sector. Despite the high quality of the business, I consider that the current valuation gives a little margin of safety. However, Arista is a great option to keep on a watchlist.

title: Arista Appointed by Spark as Private Telecommunications Cloud Networking Provider
text: AUCKLAND, New Zealand & SYDNEY--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE: ANET), an industry leader in data-driven, client to cloud networking for large data centre, campus and routing environments, announced that it has been appointed by Spark as a private cloud networking provider to support Spark's data centre networking services for a new private telecommunications cloud platform. title: Arista Networks: Growth Could Slow - Don't Get Caught Napping (Technical Analysis)
